name: Fine-Tune
description: Adapts a pre-trained model to a new task or domain by updating model weights using parameter-efficient methods such as LoRA, QLoRA, or full supervised fine-tuning, without retraining from scratch.

evidence.notes: LARS (2026) -- Parameter Efficiency Is Not Memory Efficiency: Rethinking Fine-Tuning on-Device LLM Adaptation; reduces GPU memory footprint 33.54% vs LoRA.
HuggingFace PEFT -- state-of-the-art LoRA/QLoRA/IA3 fine-tuning; 100k+ stars, CI, active maintenance.
LlamaFactory (ACL 2024) -- unified efficient fine-tuning of 100+ LLMs and VLMs; 50k+ stars, reproducible benchmarks.
